about.title: Independent HR and people advisory for scaling technology and Web3 organizations.
summary: I partner with founders, HR leaders, and boards to design operating models, talent strategies, and people analytics that connect people decisions directly to product, risk, and regulatory priorities.
My work focuses on building HR capabilities that are lean, transparent, and data-informed—without overwhelming managers or employees with process for its own sake.

experienceSection.title: Selected roles and advisory engagements.
experienceSection.description: Representative experience across in-house HR leadership and independent consulting in technology and Web3 ecosystems.

servicesSection.title: Structured advisory engagements for HR and Web3 leaders.
servicesSection.description: Each engagement is scoped with clear outcomes, timelines, and decision points, typically delivered over 8–16 weeks.
